Episodes.Title: Sideswiped
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Tony De Santis
Episodes.Plot: Copa Airlines Flight 201 disappears over Panama. Investigators are trying to piece the puzzle together to determine whether it was a mid-air collision, missile strike, bombing attempt or simply an unlucky chain of mistakes.

Episodes.Title: Niki Lauda - Testing the Limits
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Michael Rhoades
Episodes.Plot: Lauda air 004 was a767 which broke up in mid air after taking off from Thailand to Vienna Austria .

Episodes.Title: Vanishing Act
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Carlos Gonzalez-Vio
Episodes.Plot: Varig Flight 254 was a 737 on its way to Belem, Brazil from Sao Paulo, Brazil. Due to pilot error, it ran out of fuel and crashed into the Amazon jungle.

Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Andrew Gillies
Episodes.Plot: Drama recreation of the Kegworth air disaster on 8 January 1989 when British Midland Flight 92, a Boeing 737-400, crashed onto the embankment of the M1 motorway near Kegworth, UK. Of the 126 people aboard, 47 died and 74, sustaine...

Episodes.Title: The Final Push
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Jonathon Link
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Douglas E. Hughes
Episodes.Plot: While the cargo jet was attempting a landing at Narita Airport in Japan, in gusty winds, it bounced and landed inverted and burning.

Episodes.Plot: A VIP case involving the disappearance of an airplane piloted by JFK Jr. The investigators work under tremendous public pressure looking for answers, just to discover the most obvious and most common explanation for the unfortunat...

Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Jeff Gruen
Episodes.Plot: The 2000 crash of an Air France Concorde into a Paris hotel is investigated.

Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Harry Judge
Episodes.Plot: In February 2011, Manx Flight 7100 from Belfast crashes at Cork Airport, Ireland during a third attempt at landing in dense fog.

Episodes.Title: Death in the Arctic
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Glen Gaston
Episodes.Plot: Revisit the remarkable story of First Air Flight 6560, involving a mysterious crash and an unbelievable rescue effort.

Episodes.Title: What Happened to Malaysian Flight 370?
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Gary Lang
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Von Flores
Episodes.Plot: Catalogues all the possible credible theories for the disappearance of this flight. As of now (February 2016), no-one still knows exactly what happened, the plane is still yet to be found 23 months after it disappeared.
